info.description: This is the FAIMS Conductor server API documentation.
info.title: FAIMS3 API

tags.name: Records
tags.description: Read-only REST helpers for notebook records: GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/metadata` (paginated metadata) and GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/{recordId}` (full form data). **Write operations** — POST create, POST fork revision, PUT update, DELETE soft-delete — are **not published** in the live API while `ENABLE_RECORDS_CRUD_MUTATIONS` is false in `api/src/api/records.ts`. They remain disabled until design work confirms modification operations are safe at the API boundary.

UnauthorizedError.description: Access token is missing or invalid

get.description: Return a hello message as JSON
Provides details of the server such as name and description
Get a list of the notebooks managed by this server

post.description: Create a new notebook by uploading JSON metadata and ui-specification

get.summary: List all records (legacy full export shape)
get.description: Returns `{ records }` with full export-oriented payloads for every record in the notebook (internal regex listing). Requires export permission on the project. For paginated, permission-filtered **metadata** only, use GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/metadata` instead. For single-record CRUD, use GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/{recordId}`.

Returns minimal metadata for each record in the notebook that the caller may read. Supports pagination and optional filters. Deleted records are omitted by default. Distinct from GET `/notebooks/{id}/records`, which returns full export-shaped `{ records }` for legacy clients (export permission). This is the primary **read** listing for the Records API; write routes are off until `ENABLE_RECORDS_CRUD_MUTATIONS` is enabled (see Records tag description).

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Restrict to records for this form / viewset id

parameters.name: startKey
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response’s nextStartKey

parameters.name: filterDeleted
parameters.description: When false, include soft-deleted records (default true)

get.description: Returns full form data for one record. Optionally pin a specific revision with revisionId. **Write** variants of this path (PUT update, DELETE soft-delete) are not exposed while record mutations are disabled server-side.

parameters.name: revisionId
parameters.description: Specific revision to load (defaults to current head)

403.description: Not allowed to read this record

get.summary: Request signed URL for notebook records export
get.description: Builds a short-lived signed JWT and returns a JSON object with an absolute URL to `GET /notebooks/download/{token}`. Supports CSV, ZIP, GeoJSON, KML, and FULL (multi-part ZIP). CSV requires viewID. For format=full, optional boolean query flags (default true) select which parts are included: includeTabular, includeAttachments, includeGeoJSON, includeKML, includeMetadata.

parameters.name: viewID
parameters.description: Form/view identifier (required for CSV; optional for ZIP when scoping attachments)

parameters.name: includeTabular
parameters.description: When format is full: include tabular CSV exports (default true)

parameters.name: includeAttachments
parameters.description: When format is full: include attachment ZIP (default true)

parameters.name: includeGeoJSON
parameters.description: When format is full: include GeoJSON (default true)

parameters.name: includeKML
parameters.description: When format is full: include KML (default true)

parameters.name: includeMetadata
parameters.description: When format is full: include metadata (default true)

200.description: Signed download URL (token expires in a few minutes)

get.summary: Generate download token for notebook records (deprecated)
get.description: DEPRECATED: Use /notebooks/{id}/records/export instead. Generates a signed JWT token and redirects to download endpoint for exporting notebook records in CSV or ZIP format.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format (only CSV and ZIP supported in this deprecated route)

302.description: Redirect to download endpoint with JWT token

get.summary: Download notebook records using JWT token
get.description: Downloads notebook records in the format specified by the JWT token. Token expires in 5 minutes. Supports CSV, ZIP, GeoJSON, and KML formats.

parameters.name: downloadToken
parameters.description: Signed JWT download token containing download parameters (projectID, format, viewID, userID)

application/zip.example: ZIP archive containing photos and attachments

application/geo+json.example: GeoJSON file with geospatial notebook data

Content-Disposition.description: Attachment filename based on export label and format

400.description: Invalid token or missing required parameters

get.description: Get a list of users with access to a notebook

post.summary: Add a user to a notebook
post.description: Add a user to a notebook

post.summary: Create a new notebook from an existing template
post.description: Creates a new notebook based on an existing template. Requires permission to create notebooks.

requestBody.description: Template ID and project name for the new notebook

post.summary: Set server admin status for a user
post.description: Set server cluster-admin status for a user. Requires cluster-admin role.

get.description: Gets a list of templates from the templates DB.

post.description: Creates a new template. The payload is validated before processing. Requires appropriate permissions.

get.description: Gets a specific template by ID from the templates DB.

put.description: Updates an existing template. The payload is validated before processing. Requires appropriate permissions.

post.description: Deletes the latest revision of an existing template. Requires appropriate permissions.

get.description: Gets a list of all teams from the teams DB

post.description: Creates a new team. Requires authentication.
Creates a new invite for a project/notebook. Requires appropriate permissions.
Creates a new invite for a team. Requires appropriate permissions.

get.description: Get tokens for the authenticated user or all tokens (admin only)

post.description: Get a new JWT using a refresh token

post.summary: Exchange token for access/refresh token pair

fieldId.description: Field id on the parent that defines the link

formId.description: Form / viewset id for the new record

createdBy.description: Optional creator user id (defaults to authenticated user)

nextStartKey.description: Present when more results exist; pass as startKey on the next request

update.description: Map of field id → value (and optional annotations) per data-model form update shape

createdBy.description: Optional user id for the new revision (defaults to authenticated user)

RecordsDetailResponse.description: Shape matches GetRecordResponse in @faims3/data-model (revisionId, formId, data, context with hydrated record/revision)

context.description: Includes hrid, record, and revision documents

createdBy.description: User ID who created the team

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when team was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when team was last updated

role.description: Role to be assigned to the user

invitedBy.description: User ID who created the invite

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when invite was created

role.description: Role to be assigned to the user in the team

invitedBy.description: User ID who created the invite

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when invite was created

role.description: Role to assign to the invited user

name.description: Name/email of the person being invited

uses.description: Number of times the invite can be used (optional)

userId.description: User ID who owns the token

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when token was created

lastUsed.description: Unix timestamp when token was last used

isActive.description: Whether the token is currently active

refreshToken.description: The refresh token to exchange for a new access token

token.description: Token to exchange (e.g., OAuth token, invite token)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens
